subject: Sociology
title: The Future of Culture
description: A quick, practical guide to The Future of Culture.

hook.text: AI writes songs. Algorithms curate taste. Virtual worlds host communities. What will culture even mean tomorrow?

buildup.text: Technology is transforming how culture is created, distributed, and consumed at an accelerating pace.

discovery.text: AI-generated art, virtual reality, and global platforms create new cultural forms no previous generation imagined.

twist.text: But technology concentrates cultural power. A few platforms decide what billions see, hear, and think about.

climax.text: The future of culture depends on who controls the tools. Technology is neutral, but ownership never is.

punchline.text: Culture's future depends on who owns the platform.

quiz.question: What is the key concern about the future of culture?
options: A few platforms and companies control what billions consume
Technology has no effect on culture
